name: Emergent Calligraphic Ecosystems
description: A system of interacting calligraphic strokes following local orientation rules that spontaneously form complex alien writing systems. Mouse plants seeds or disturbs regions. Audio influences stroke behavior and interaction rules. Elegant ink-like or neon self-organizing glyphs.

params.name: Stroke Density
params.description: Number of calligraphic strokes per glyph cluster

params.name: Complexity
params.description: Scale and complexity of glyph clusters
